heading: Membership
label: 152303 Membership
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15230336:666., .Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 824, § 670 Stat. 796
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15230336:666., .Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 824, § 670 Stat. 796

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: a .—Eligibility
children.text: Except as provided in this chapter, eligibility for membership in the corporation and the rights and privileges of members are as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Voting
children.label: b .—Voting
children.text: Each member has one vote in the conduct of official business of the corporation.
